headline: Parker Reports Fiscal 2026 Third Quarter Results
summary: Record Sales of $5.5 Billion Drive Record Cash Flow and Adjusted EPS; Orders +9%CLEVELAND, April 30, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Parker Hannifin Corporation (NYSE: PH), the global leader in motion and control technologies, today reported results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, that included the following highlights (compared with the prior year period): Fiscal 2026 Third Quarter Highlights: Sales increased 11% to a record $5.5 billion; organic sales increased 6.5%Segment operating margin was
